text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Be sure to enter your Veteran Umamusume
in many races!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In Daily Races, you can earn monies and
Support Points, among other things.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can only run in these races a set
number of times per day, so make sure to
enter every day.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to explain Team Trials, where
you can create and compete with a team
of Veteran Umamusume.
